title: Quick Start — Create Your First Design
description: The 3-minute path from an empty dashboard to a fully sized solar design. The cursor leads and the tour walks onto the New Project screen for you.

steps.title: Your dashboard
steps.description: Every design you create is listed here with its status.
steps.voiceScript: Welcome to SolarPro. This is your dashboard — every solar design you create appears here with its status.
steps.captionText: Welcome to SolarPro. This is your dashboard — every solar design you create appears here with its status.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your dashboard: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Where you start a design
steps.description: Residential, commercial and industrial PV all start here.
steps.voiceScript: To begin a new design you use Create Standard Project. Watch the cursor move to it.
steps.captionText: To begin a new design you use Create Standard Project. Watch the cursor move to it.
steps.fallbackMessage: Where you start a design: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Open the New Project screen
steps.description: The tour now walks onto the design form.
steps.voiceScript: Let us open it — the tour will now take you onto the New Project screen.
steps.captionText: Let us open it — the tour will now take you onto the New Project screen.
steps.fallbackMessage: Open the New Project screen: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Name the design
steps.description: Every design starts with a memorable name.
steps.voiceScript: On this new screen we start by naming the design — for example, Accra Rooftop 25 kilowatt-peak. The cursor is typing it for you now.
steps.captionText: On this new screen we start by naming the design — for example, Accra Rooftop 25 kilowatt-peak. The cursor is typing it for you now.
steps.fallbackMessage: Name the design: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: File it in a folder
steps.description: Folders keep your growing list of designs organised.
steps.voiceScript: Next we file it in a folder so it is easy to find again later.
steps.captionText: Next we file it in a folder so it is easy to find again later.
steps.fallbackMessage: File it in a folder: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Create and continue
steps.description: Creating the project opens the globe to set your site.
steps.voiceScript: Now we create the project. This opens the globe where you pick your site — that fixes your sun hours, temperature and tariff. From there you add your loads, and the engine sizes the array, battery, inverter and cables, with twenty-five-year economics, all ready as PDF reports. That is the whole quick start.
steps.captionText: Now we create the project. This opens the globe where you pick your site — that fixes your sun hours, temperature and tariff. From there you add your loads, and the engine sizes the array, battery, inverter and cables, with twenty-five-year economics, all ready as PDF reports. That is the whole quick start.
steps.fallbackMessage: Create and continue: not visible on this screen yet.
